comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

The system, and/or Podman on it, is very likely too old (https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11862 ). Modifying the `podman run` command to include `--security-opt seccomp=unconfined` would probably help.

Or, preferably, update your system.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Please reopen if the above did not make a difference.
